data.title: 国际服愚人节直播「Pandemonium Society Special Live Stream」
data.summary: [Pandemonium Society Special Live Preview] Sensei! Pandemonium Society is hosting a special live bro
data.body:
[Pandemonium Society Special Live Preview]

Sensei! Pandemonium Society is hosting a special live broadcast today—something about Pandemonium Day...?
I wonder what it’s all about!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2775148
